testcase.name: testLoginAdmin
testcase.system-out:
... ... TestNG 7.12.0 by Cédric Beust (cedric@beust.com) ...
=== Login sukses, token didapat === user token: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJ1c2VyQHB0ZGlrYS5jb20iLCJleHAiOjE3NzgxNjI0MDgsImlhdCI6MTc3ODA3NjAwOCwianRpIjoiZDdmMjQ1ZTktM2FjMS00MjQ3LWI5MDctY2QxZDBjMTFjZmUzIiwicm9sZXMiOiJST0xFX1VTRVIsY29yZTpyZWFkLGhyaXM6cmVhZCxGQUNUT1JfUEFTU1dPUkQifQ.VE-BODXLzGLKLLuF3qkh1DjHpG3WZbMuhHi_kaSWqCc login admin success: true message: Login successful

testcase.name: testAddUser
testcase.system-out: { "success": true, "message": "User created successfully", "data": { "active": true, "email": "suki1778076011570@example.com", "fullName": "Suki ahmad", "id": "db6769e7-682d-45f6-9525-5dc89af48a94", "ipAddress": null, "lastAccess": null, "photo": null, "roles": [ "ROLE_USER" ], "username": "Suki1778076011570" } } ID User yang didapat: db6769e7-682d-45f6-9525-5dc89af48a94
